Home / Services / Cosmetic Dentistry

Cosmetic Dentistry

Enhance your smile with customized aesthetic treatments.

In image-conscious Scottsdale, your smile is often your first introduction. Our cosmetic dentistry services help you make the best impression, whether you're networking at Fashion Square or enjoying North Scottsdale's social scene.

We offer teeth whitening treatments specifically formulated to combat stains from coffee, tea, and red wine—popular among our local clients. Porcelain veneers can transform your smile while withstanding our intense sunlight that might reveal flaws in lesser materials.

For patients in Scottsdale's luxury communities, we provide discreet in-office whitening that delivers dramatic results in about an hour. Our cosmetic consultations include digital smile design to preview your potential results.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Comprehensive smile analysis and digital imaging
  2. 02 Step 2: Custom treatment plan discussion
  3. 03 Step 3: Precise treatment with attention to detail
  4. 04 Step 4: Final adjustments and aftercare instructions

Benefits

  • Natural-looking results
  • Durable materials suited for Arizona climate
  • Quick, effective treatments
  • Customized to complement facial features

Frequently Asked Questions

Will my veneers look unnatural in Arizona's bright sunlight?

We use high-quality porcelain that mimics natural tooth translucency, ensuring your smile looks authentic even in our intense desert light.

How long does professional whitening last in our climate?

With proper care, results typically last 6-12 months. We provide touch-up kits and recommend avoiding stain-causing foods and drinks immediately after treatment.

Are cosmetic treatments covered by insurance?

Most cosmetic procedures aren't covered, but we offer flexible payment options and can often combine cosmetic work with medically necessary treatments for better coverage.

Book an Appointment

Ready to get started with cosmetic dentistry? Contact us today.

Schedule Now Or call: 555-den-r91
